ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Andrew S. Cantor, Esq., appearing with Plaintiff Mical Raponi,
No appearance by defaulted Defendant Blessed Marvelous Herve,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Mical Raponi Sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $99,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $520.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $99,520.00

Judgment signed in open court.
